userMessage: Suggest the best acquisition settings for capturing a 1MHz square wave with minimal aliasing on my MSO6B

response.text:
I replaced the 2-step shell with a safe MSO6B anti-alias setup flow for a 1 MHz square wave on CH1 and readback of the actual horizontal settings.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Assuming the 1 MHz square wave is on CH1; exact best numeric sample-rate and record-length targets depend on enabled channels and desired time span, so this flow applies verified low-alias defaults, disables features that can obscure sampling artifacts, sets a simple rising-edge trigger, and reads back the actual horizontal settings instead of forcing an arbitrary numeric target.","findings":["Verified SCPI was sufficient for acquisition mode, FastAcq, FastFrame, persistence, Autoset acquisition control, and A-edge trigger source/slope.","Exact source-of-truth verification for a universally best numeric sample-rate/record-length pair for every MSO6B configuration was insufficient, so no arbitrary numeric values were forced."],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"MSO6B\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"MSO6B 1 MHz Square Wave Minimal Aliasing Setup","description":"Configures safe acquisition defaults for a 1 MHz square wave on CH1 and reads back the resulting horizontal settings.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"group","label":"Recommended Setup","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"comment","label":"Comment","params":{"text":"Assumes the 1 MHz square wave is connected to CH1. For minimal aliasing, use Sample mode for fidelity, disable FastAcq, FastFrame, and persistence while tuning, and keep the displayed time span to only a few cycles with the highest practical sample density."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"write","label":"Apply Acquisition Defaults","params":{"command":"ACQuire:MODe SAMple; ACQuire:FASTAcq:STATE OFF; HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE OFF; DISplay:PERSistence OFF"},"id":"s1_4"},{"type":"write","label":"Set Trigger and Lock Autoset Acquisition","params":{"command":"AUTOSet:ACQuisition:ENAble OFF; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH1; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe"},"id":"s1_5"},{"type":"error_check","label":"Error Check","params":{"command":"ALLEV?"},"id":"s1_6"}],"id":"g1_2"},{"type":"group","label":"Read Back","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"query","label":"Read Acquisition Mode","params":{"command":"ACQuire:MODe?","saveAs":"acquire_mode"},"id":"s1_8"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Trigger Source","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce?","saveAs":"trigger_a_edge_source"},"id":"s1_9"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Trigger Slope","params":{"command":"TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe?","saveAs":"trigger_a_edge_slope"},"id":"s1_10"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Sample Rate","params":{"command":"HORizontal:MODe:SAMPLERate?","saveAs":"horizontal_sample_rate"},"id":"s1_11"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Time Scale","params":{"command":"HORizontal:MODe:SCAle?","saveAs":"horizontal_scale"},"id":"s1_12"},{"type":"query","label":"Read Record Length","params":{"command":"HORizontal:MODe:RECOrdlength?","saveAs":"horizontal_record_length"},"id":"s1_13"}],"id":"g1_7"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["MSO6B"]},"id":"s1_14"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Assuming the 1 MHz square wave is on CH1; exact best numeric sample-rate and record-length targets depend on enabled channels and desired time span, so this flow applies verified low-alias defaults, disables features that can obscure sampling artifacts, sets a simple rising-edge trigger, and reads back the actual horizontal settings instead of forcing an arbitrary numeric target.
findings: Verified SCPI was sufficient for acquisition mode, FastAcq, FastFrame, persistence, Autoset acquisition control, and A-edge trigger source/slope.
Exact source-of-truth verification for a universally best numeric sample-rate/record-length pair for every MSO6B configuration was insufficient, so no arbitrary numeric values were forced.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "MSO6B" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: MSO6B 1 MHz Square Wave Minimal Aliasing Setup
flow.description: Configures safe acquisition defaults for a 1 MHz square wave on CH1 and reads back the resulting horizontal settings.

params.text: Assumes the 1 MHz square wave is connected to CH1. For minimal aliasing, use Sample mode for fidelity, disable FastAcq, FastFrame, and persistence while tuning, and keep the displayed time span to only a few cycles with the highest practical sample density.

params.command: ACQuire:MODe SAMple; ACQuire:FASTAcq:STATE OFF; HORizontal:FASTframe:STATE OFF; DISplay:PERSistence OFF

children.label: Set Trigger and Lock Autoset Acquisition

params.command: AUTOSet:ACQuisition:ENAble OFF; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SOUrce CH1; TRIGger:A:EDGE:SLOpe RISe
